name: spring-modernization-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for Spring ecosystem modernization. v1.11.0 adds Spring Boot 4.1.0-RC1 and Spring AI 2.0.0-M7 coverage: pluginRepositories support, multi-provider classpath collision enforcement, BOM override reconciliation, options-setter migration, MCP SSE → Streamable HTTP, and per-artifact --target-rc opt-in.

scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint
scripts.check:all: pnpm run check && pnpm run link-check
scripts.fix: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
